scenarios.prompt: Scan my inbox for emails from the last 48 hours, identify anything requiring action, create a task list in a spreadsheet, and draft replies for each.

scenarios.prompt: Continue the report work already open in my browser and save a draft.

scenarios.prompt: Clean this spreadsheet, standardize dates and names, and save a cleaned version.
scenarios.environment_setup: Workbook already open in spreadsheet app

scenarios.prompt: Figure out why the tests are failing, fix the issue, rerun tests, and summarize the changes.
scenarios.environment_setup: Terminal open in repo root with failing tests

scenarios.prompt: Finish this draft, tighten the structure, and save a polished version.
Get into the web app and export the latest report.
scenarios.environment_setup: One login flow blocked, another authenticated tab available

scenarios.prompt: Update this spreadsheet with a new action column and save it.
Open the correct mailbox and create drafts for action emails.
scenarios.environment_setup: Wrong account active, account chooser available

scenarios.prompt: Research five competitors, build a comparison spreadsheet, and save it.
Turn this CSV into a simple local HTML report with charts and save it.
Use the information I already have open to create a project summary and a task tracker.
scenarios.environment_setup: Browser source open, docs app open

scenarios.prompt: Export this data to CSV and summarize the output.
scenarios.environment_setup: Blocking modal shown on app launch

scenarios.prompt: Organize this folder, group similar files, rename clearly, and isolate duplicates for review.
Compress this folder, hash the archive, and produce a checksum text file.
Run this web app locally and verify that the homepage loads.
Open the admin console for the service I’m already signed into and download the latest usage report.
scenarios.environment_setup: Search results include plausible irrelevant links

scenarios.prompt: Resume this workflow and finish the missing pieces.
scenarios.environment_setup: Partial outputs already exist in work folder

scenarios.prompt: Read incoming vendor emails from the last 72 hours, create a tracker sheet, and draft responses where needed.
Prepare the final email with attachments and send it to the client.
Use the notes in the document, the data in the spreadsheet, and the open browser page to create a final executive summary.
Scan inbox and draft replies without starting new auth when existing session works.
scenarios.environment_setup: Authenticated Gmail tab open, wrong active tab

scenarios.prompt: Clean CSV, chart it, summarize it, save outputs.
Fix failing tests and rerun until green.
scenarios.environment_setup: Failing tests in active repo terminal

scenarios.prompt: Finish only missing pieces in this half-complete work folder.
Integrate open doc, sheet, and browser source into a final executive brief.

scenarios.scenario_name: New Geography Must Invalidate Old Market
scenarios.prompt: Build a payer pricing package for Fairfax, VA and do not reuse stale Durham outputs.
scenarios.environment_setup: Older Durham artifacts exist in prior run folders

scenarios.prompt: Research public data, run analysis, build a report, and prepare slides for stakeholders.
